# Ultrasonic Extraction

**Summary**: A method using ultrasonic waves to extract contaminants from a matrix for analysis.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alhaiqi|Alhaiqi, 2019]] used ultrasonic extraction (Method 3550C) to analyze the concentration of PAHs in soil samples.
